text:
There was a young woman named Marla who lived alone. One day she went out for groceries.

As she walked down the street, she heard birds singing. She stopped to listen.

A sweet song filled her mind. It was like nothing she had ever heard before.

She followed the song and found herself on a grassy field. There were birds perched on twigs and young animals playing.

She smiled.

Suddenly, a big, gray owl hooted. Marla startled.

"No!"she gasped.

But then she smiled again.

The owl flew down and landed ON her shoulders.

"Oh wow!"she giggled.

The owl just looked down at her calmly.

"You enjoy nature?"

"Yes,"she said. "You?"

"It likes songbirds."

She felt grateful.

Marla took off.

Hours flew by. She got home late.

That night, she dreamed about owls.

They were the best singers.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
